evals.prompt: Write a Jupyter notebook plan for scraping a protected Semrush-style dashboard. I will login manually in the opened browser, then extract a React keyword table and export to CSV without Pandas.
expected_checks: Requires input() pause for manual login
Includes post-login DOM wait of 3-5 seconds
Prefers structure/text-based XPath/CSS over dynamic classes
Uses built-in csv with encoding='utf-8' and newline=''

evals.prompt: The target page uses random class names every deploy. Propose a robust extraction strategy and error-handling approach for Jupyter scraping.
expected_checks: Avoids dynamic class selectors as primary strategy
Uses structure/text-based selectors with fallback paths
Wraps critical extraction points in try-except
Explains graceful degradation and partial output

evals.prompt: Use Pandas DataFrame for quick CSV export in this notebook.
expected_checks: Rejects Pandas due to PRD constraints
Redirects to built-in csv export requirements
